description: The Licentiate in Music (L.Mus.) Major Performance Jazz is a 100-credit program with options in various instruments. Special Requirements 1. Continuation in the program requires that a grade of A- be maintained in practical instruction/exams and ensembles. 2. Candidates must take the L.Mus. Jazz Performance 1 Examination at the end of their first year of study and the L.Mus. Jazz Performance 2 and 3 Examinations in each of the next two years if they hope to complete the program in the normal length of time.
